zh.lifeSummary: Walter De Appleby II是Henry De Appleby I的兒子，於1150年出生在英國英格蘭萊希斯特斯爾阿波萊比 馬尼亞。他至少有1個兒子。他去世於1198年在他的家鄉享年48歲。

nameMeanings.name: De
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Dilip, Anirban, Gopal, Alok, Anindya, Arunava, Asit, Asok, Dibyendu, Goutam, Indra, Indranil.

variants.name: Dey
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Ashit, Indu, Naina, Partha, Soumya, Ajit, Anjan, Anjana, Anup, Arjun, Arun, Ashim.
English, Scottish, and Welsh: variant of   Day  .
German: topographic name from a field name in North Rhine-Westphalia, denoting a sizeable piece of land, from Middle Low German dē ‘thigh’ (referring to the shape of the property).

nameMeanings.name: Appleby
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English (northern): habitational name from any of various places, for example in Leicestershire, Lincolnshire, and Cumbria, named from Old English æppel or Old Norse epli ‘apple’ + Old Norse bȳ ‘farm’.

nameMeanings.name: Walter
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: From an Old French personal name of Germanic (Frankish) origin, derived from wald ‘rule’ + heri, hari ‘army’. This was adopted by the Normans and introduced by them to England, superseding the native Old English form, Wealdhere. It was a very popular name in medieval England, normally pronounced ‘Water’.

variants.name: Walther
meanings: from wald ‘rule’ + heri ‘army’; name of the famous medieval minnesinger Walther von der Vogelweide ( c.1170– c.1230 ).

en.lifeSummary: Walter De Appleby II was born in 1150, in Appleby Magna, Leicestershire, England, United Kingdom as the son of Henry De Appleby I. He had at least 1 son. He died in 1198, in his hometown, at the age of 48.

fr.lifeSummary: Walter De Appleby II est né en 1150, à Appleby Magna, Leicestershire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, fils de Henry De Appleby I. Il a eu au moins 1 fils. Il est décédé en 1198, dans sa ville natale, à l’âge de 48 ans.

ja.lifeSummary: Walter De Appleby IIは1150年にイギリスイギリスレアイセステルシュアイアアップレビー マグナでHenry De Appleby Iの息子として生まれた。彼は少なくとも1人の息子をもうけた。彼は1198年に故郷で48歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Walter De Appleby II(은)는 1150년 영국 잉글랜드 레이스스터실르 애플레비 매그나에서 Henry De Appleby I의 아들로 태어났다. 그는 적어도 한 명의 아들을 두었다. 그는 1198년 그의 고향에서 48세의 나이로 사망했다.
